findings.title: Impossible counts
findings.why: "Levi Family" has an attending count greater than party size, inflating headcount improperly.
findings.do: Verify the correct attending count for "Levi Family".

findings.title: Confirmed-but-zero attendance
findings.why: "Peretz" has confirmed but has an attending count of zero, affecting minimum headcount accuracy.
findings.do: Contact "Peretz" to verify if they are attending or correct their details.

findings.title: Ambiguous plus-ones
findings.why: Households "Friedman" and "Goldstein" have plus-ones allowed but no names provided, causing uncertainty in headcount projections.
findings.do: Contact these households to confirm the presence of their plus-ones.

findings.title: Overdue RSVPs
findings.why: Multiple households ("Mizrahi Family", "Friedman", "Goldstein", "Sharabi Family", "Dahan Family", "Malka Family", "Biton Family", "Ohana Family") have not responded despite the past RSVP deadline, causing uncertainty in headcount.
findings.do: Reach out to these households, prioritizing larger parties due to their potential impact on headcount.
